name: Neumann
description:
I love the idea of Petals of Reincarnation, but I just don’t like the story. Don’t expect her to be accurate, reading the manga feel like a chore, and she’s the only character I like.

Recap, the power system is people being Reincarnations of famous figures, and gain a ”Talent” associated to that figure, like Newton has gravity powers, and it was hinted that Rasputin is unkillable. Also, Reincarnations are called Returners.

Reommendation: her power is pretty much predicting the future using math, so maybe do something so unlogical or stupid she hadn’t predict it.
creator: Aza_Del_Fey
